title: campanula rotundifolia var. angustifolia
intro: Campanula rotundifolia var. angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved bellflower, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the bellflower family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as its potential antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, Campanula rotundifolia var. angustifolia is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to support overall health and well-being.
